projects.title: NMC Hackathon 2026 - Mobile-Controlled Robot
projects.desc: Built a robot controlled via a custom mobile application. The system allows real-time control of four servo motors, enabling precise movement and interaction.

projects.title: National Robotics Competition - Biped Robot
projects.desc: Developed a biped robot as part of an industrial mobility challenge. The robot was designed to simulate human-like walking and maintain balance in dynamic conditions.

projects.title: SRG Hackathon 2026 - Spider Robot
projects.desc: Designed and programmed a spider robot capable of navigating autonomously through a maze. The project focused on pathfinding, obstacle avoidance, and real-time movement control.

projects.title: RLC Competition 2026 - Autonomous Maze Car
projects.desc: Designed and developed an autonomous car capable of navigating through a maze using ultrasonic sensors. The system detects obstacles in real-time and makes navigation decisions without human intervention.

projects.title: CampusStage
projects.desc: CampusStage est une plateforme web de recherche de stages pour étudiants, développée avec React, Laravel et SQL avancé. Elle permet de consulter, rechercher et postuler facilement aux offres de stage.

projects.title: Planit
projects.desc: Plan'It est une plateforme communautaire qui recrée du lien social authentique en simplifiant l'organisation et le partage d'activités réelles.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.desc: A modern personal portfolio built using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Tailwind CSS. Features smooth scrolling, responsive sections, and elegant UI animations.
